columns.extraction_plan: The number of patients randomized to the ADT plus D arm was 192 (page 2, text). The text also states that "patients received a median number of eight and six cycles of D" (page 5, text), implying actual administration. However, an explicit count and percentage of participants in the treatment arm who *received* docetaxel (e.g., "X patients (Y%) received docetaxel") is not reported.

In the control arm (ADT arm), 152 patients (79%) received docetaxel as salvage therapy. Locate the paragraph on page 5 that states: "In the GETUG-AFU15 study, in contrast, the vast majority of patients (79%) in the ADT arm received so-called salvage D within a median time of 18.5 mo (95% CI, 2.9-179) indicating that this trial was more a trial of early versus delayed D." The number of patients in the ADT arm is 193 (page 2, text). Calculate 79% of 193 to get the count (0.79 * 193 = 152.47, rounded to 152).
